rules.description: １秒間押し続けないとcommand-qが実行されない設定
Use Delete as Move to Trash
Use Backspace as Go to Previous Folder
CAPS_LOCK to HYPER (SHIFT+COMMAND+OPTION+CONTROL) or ESCAPE (If Alone)

manipulators.description: Avoid starting sysdiagnose with the built-in macOS shortcut cmd+shift+option+ctrl+,
Avoid starting sysdiagnose with the built-in macOS shortcut cmd+shift+option+ctrl+.

from.description: Avoid starting sysdiagnose with the built-in macOS shortcut cmd+shift+option+ctrl+/

rules.description: Toggle caps_lock by pressing left_shift then right_shift
Shifts Move Forward and Backward by 1 word
Change control + mouse motion to scroll wheel (rev 1)
Use Delete as Move to Trash
Use Backspace as Go to Previous Folder
control + u/y/c = 1del/del to head/del to end
Change input source to English by left_command; Russian by right_command.
CAPSLOCK is CTRL if pressed in combination, otherwise ESC
a-mode for hjkl movement and nm enter and ui tab and ,. PageDn/Up
r-mode for deleting characters with ui, words with jk and lines with hl
e-mode allows for easy back and forth one character, word or line
w-mode = e-mode + SHIFT (i.e. selection, not just movement)
q-mode for general shortcuts like browser tab navigation

to.shell_command: open -F -na 'Google Chrome' --args https://chat.openai.com/g/g-kXs6rmvRN-ying-wen-hurezutietuka; osascript -e 'delay 1' -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "v" using command down' -e 'delay 1' -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke return'
